mapper.sql: user_id, account, password_hash, display_name, email, phone, college, grade, user_role, user_status, point_balance, last_login_time, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_info ( account, password_hash, display_name, email, phone, college, grade, user_role, user_status, point_balance, last_login_time, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{account}, #{passwordHash}, #{displayName}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{college}, #{grade}, #{userRole}, #{userStatus}, #{pointBalance}, #{lastLoginTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted} )
mapper.update: UPDATE user_info SET account = #{account}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, display_name = #{displayName}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, college = #{college}, grade = #{grade}, user_role = #{userRole}, user_status = #{userStatus}, point_balance = #{pointBalance}, last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime}, update_time = #{updateTime}, deleted = #{deleted} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM user_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM user_info WHERE account = #{account} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_info WHERE account = #{account} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM user_info WHERE user_status = 'PENDING_REVIEW' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT user_id FROM user_info WHERE user_role = 'ADMINISTRATOR' AND user_status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted = 0
